suggest.drupal/layout_builder_restrictions: Manage which fields & layouts are available in Layout Builder.
suggest.drupal/matomo: Reports site visitor analytics to a Matomo instance.
suggest.drupal/matomo_reporting_api: Allows to retrieve reports from the Matomo API.
suggest.drupal/webform: Enables the creation of webforms and questionnaires.
suggest.drupal/statistics: Logs how many times content is viewed.
